description: Indulge your furry friend with our exclusive range of pet fashion. Catering to discerning pet owners, our collection showcases an assortment of luxury pet clothing that will make your dog stand out in style. From the latest runway trends to classic pieces, our dog clothing line offers a variety of outfits designed for ultimate comfort and chic aesthetics. Whether you're looking for a chic coat for your pet or a fashionable ensemble for a special occasion, we've got you covered. Our pet outfits not only exude elegance but also provide warmth and protection. Explore our luxury pet fashion collection and give your pet the style upgrade they deserve. Perfect for all dog breeds, our pet clothing is the epitome of fashion meeting function.
short_description: Discover our exclusive range of luxury pet clothing designed for discerning pet owners. Our collection features stylish and comfortable outfits for dogs, perfect for all breeds. Explore our chic pet fashion line today and give your pet a style upgrade they deserve.

designer.description: I spend my days crafting gorgeous graphics. I work mainly with small local businesses. I’ve just spent 2 years living in Sweden. I moved back to Russia in October 2015 and am now settled in Moskow. I’m constantly learning design related topics, currently playing around a lot with flyer design for clubs and pubs.
